name: super-sol
description: Evidence-gated paired evaluation harness as a Claude Code plugin. Runs deterministic GPT-5.5 vs GPT-5.6 Sol crossover evaluations with an out-of-band grader, fail-closed Docker verification, and aggregate reporting. Measures whether routed procedures improve observable outcomes; it never converts unverified completion into success and it does not make model-superiority claims below the preregistered evidence threshold.
